title: Bill Moore
compiled_truth: Bill Moore is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-22 to 2002-01-31), Bill Moore sent 3 and received 232 emails, totalling 235 interactions. Top correspondents: [Janine Migden](people/janine-migden) (3), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (3), [Donald Lassere](people/donald-lassere) (3), [Gavin Russo](people/gavin-russo) (2), [Jerry Moore](people/jerry-moore) (2). Mailbox folders observed: personal, southeast.
